pages.text: 咘咘在卧室的大床上，发现床好软好弹！她轻轻跳了一下，“咦，好好玩！”
pages.text_en: Bubu was on the big bed in the bedroom and discovered it was so soft and bouncy! She gave a little jump. "Ooh, this is fun!"

pages.text: 咘咘越跳越高，越跳越开心！“蹦——蹦——蹦！”她笑得好大声。
pages.text_en: Bubu bounced higher and higher, happier and happier! "Boing — boing — boing!" She laughed so loud.

pages.text: 突然，咘咘跳得太靠边了，差点撞到窗台上！“哎呀！”她吓了一跳。
pages.text_en: Suddenly, Bubu bounced too close to the edge and almost hit the windowsill! "Oh no!" She got a fright.

pages.text: 咘咘又蹦了几下，脚滑了一下，差点从床边掉下去！她一屁股坐在床上，心怦怦跳。
pages.text_en: Bubu bounced a few more times, her foot slipped, and she almost fell off the bed! She plopped down, her heart pounding.

pages.text: Sam爸爸听到声音跑过来：“咘咘，在床上跳要小心哦！”
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam heard the noise and came running. "Bubu, be careful jumping on the bed!"

pages.text: Tina妈妈也来了，温柔地说：“想跳可以呀，但是要抓住床的栏杆才安全哦。”
pages.text_en: Mommy Tina came too and said gently, "You can jump if you want, but hold onto the bed railing to be safe."

pages.text: 爸爸妈妈把咘咘带到床栏杆旁边，教她用小手紧紧抓住栏杆。“像这样抓紧，就不会摔倒啦！”
pages.text_en: Daddy and Mommy brought Bubu to the bed railing and taught her to hold on tight with her little hands. "Hold on like this, and you won't fall!"

pages.text: 咘咘抓着栏杆，蹦蹦跳跳！“抓住栏杆跳，又好玩又安全！”
pages.text_en: Bubu held the railing and bounced happily! "Jumping while holding the railing is fun AND safe!"

pages.text: 咘咘开心地跳啊跳，爸爸妈妈在旁边笑着看。安全地玩耍，才是最快乐的！
pages.text_en: Bubu jumped and jumped happily while Daddy and Mommy watched with smiles. Playing safely is the happiest way to play!
